latestSummary: Installed the reusable agent handoff workflow in this repository.
Corrected the README handoff section so it no longer points to a missing bootstrap script.
nextSteps: Use context:update after each meaningful change and refresh the handoff again before stopping work.
risks: PowerShell blocks npm.ps1 on this machine, so use npm.cmd or node scripts/context-handoff.mjs if npm run fails.
decisions: AGENTS.md, AGENT_HANDOFF.md, and .agent-context/state.json are the required handoff source of truth for future agents.
verification: Confirmed the pre-commit hook runs scripts/context-handoff.mjs check --staged.
